Notes: ECAC Championship Game-MVP Kendra Vavrina (Pittsford Sutherland) scored 25
points and grabbed eight rebounds to lead Geneseo to the ECAC Upstate title.
Senior Tara Snavlin (HF-L) scored a game high 27 points for the Knights.  The
Red Hawks were led by Kristin Kaczynski's 18 points.
Game.Location: Louise Kuhl Gym, Geneseo, NY-ECAC Final
Game.Officials: Lyle Porray,  Tim Fuller,  Keith Miller,  Alt-Vic Torregiano
